Telemarketing Script for User’s Choice
Hey, my name is ________________? 	From (your companies name)?
Who’s the right person to speak here about employee training? Would that
be the head of HR department? Is it you? Someone else?
Great! Well, 	mate, 	the 	reason 	for 	the 	call 	today 	is 	that 	we 	work 	in
conjunction 	with 	the 	state 	government, 	and 	right 	now 	there’s 	100%
government 	funding 	available 	to 	get 	your 	workers 	their 	national
qualification for farming and rural operations. Mate, are you familiar at with
the government funding that’s available right now?
Okay, great! Well, all I’d like to do right now, with your permission, of
course, is send you a bit of information on my company, (your companies
name), via email, along with a quick explanation of how the government
funding works, and then get back to you over the next few days to discuss
things in more detail. Sound fair enough?
Okay, great, mate! What’s your best email address?
Okay, great. Just a couple of quick questions, so I can tailor the email to best
suits your needs.
1) And how many people do you have out in the field right now, doing
___________, just a ballpark?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

2) And any drivers … or warehouse people?
3) And how about their employment status? Are they permanent, either
full time or part time, or are they casual?
4) And is this your only business, or are there any other divisions?
Okay, great. Well, mate, based on everything you just said to me, this is
definitely a perfect fit for you. And let me get that email out to you straight
away … and then I’ll get back to you in the next few days and we can go
through things in more detail. Sound good?
Great! And what’s the best time to speak to you, morning … afternoon? I’m
flexible either way.
BD Agent: Okay, great. And are you in the office most of the time, or are
you out in the field?
BD Agent: (Either way) And what’s the best mobile number to reached on?
More and more of my clients prefer that nowadays.
BD Agent: Okay, great, mate. Again, my name is _________, and my
company is (your companies name). I look forward to talking to you in a few
couple of days. Sound good?
BD Agent: Have a great day, mate.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
